---
title: "General John Oldfield RA"
---

## General John Oldfield RA

**Dates:** (1789-2 August 1863)

### Description

army officer

### Biography

He married, thirdly (12 March 1849), at Plymouth, Cordelia Anne Duke Yonge. [ODNB]

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 4th [1863]
- Letter from March 14. 1849

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
